🧪 Infrastructure Features Regression Test

Testing Features: 1, 2, 3 (Database Connection, Schema, Persistence)

Date:

Test Controls

Feature 1: Database Connection (Chrome Storage API)

Description: Verify Chrome Extension can connect to Chrome Storage API

Feature 2: Database Schema (pages, widgets, settings, chat_history)

Description: Verify storage schemas are properly initialized

Feature 3: Data Persistence (across reload and restart)

Description: Verify data survives extension reload and browser restart

Test Summary

Console Log
